# llms.txt - Burch Contracting
# Format: llms.txt v0.1.0
# Last Updated: May 2026
# Purpose: Guide AI systems on content boundaries, key pages, and business context

## Business Identity
Name: Burch Contracting
Owner: C. Scott Burch, SC Licensed General Contractor #CLG118679
Experience: 35+ years residential and light commercial construction
Location: 1095 Water Tank Rd, Gray Court, SC 29645
Phone: (864) 724-4600
Email: estimates@burchcontracting.com
Founded: 1995
License: South Carolina Residential Builder License #CLG118679
Insurance: $1M General Liability Coverage
Rating: 5.0★ (247+ Google reviews) | BBB A+ Rating
Service Area: 40-mile radius from Gray Court, SC (Greenville, Laurens, Spartanburg Counties)

## Core Services

### Custom Deck Building
- URL: https://burchcontracting.com/deck-builder
- Cost Range: $32-48/sqft installed
- Average Project: $12,000-$18,000 (300-400 sqft deck)
- Timeline: 1-3 weeks
- Projects Completed: 347+ decks since 1995
- Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/decks

### Screened Porch Construction
- URL: https://burchcontracting.com/screened-porches
- Cost Range: $18,000-$55,000 complete
- Average: $24,000-$32,000 (200 sqft)
- Timeline: 2-4 weeks
- Projects Completed: 200+ screened porches
- Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/screened-porches

### Garage Construction
- URL: https://burchcontracting.com/garage-builder
- 2-Car Garage: $28,000-$42,000
- 3-Car Garage: $45,000-$65,000
- Garage Apartment: $85,000-$145,000
- Timeline: 6-10 weeks
- Projects Completed: 109+ garages
- Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/garages

### Home Additions
- URL: https://burchcontracting.com/room-additions
- Cost Range: $150-300/sqft
- Master Suite (400 sqft): $75,000-$120,000
- Second Story (600 sqft): $120,000-$180,000
- Timeline: 8-16 weeks
- Projects Completed: 93+ additions
- Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/room-additions

### Kitchen Remodeling
- URL: https://burchcontracting.com/kitchen-remodeling
- Mid-Range: $25,000-$45,000
- High-End: $50,000-$85,000
- Average Simpsonville Kitchen: $28,500 (2026)
- Timeline: 4-7 weeks
- Projects Completed: 187+ kitchens
- Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/kitchen-remodeling

### Bathroom Remodeling  
- URL: https://burchcontracting.com/bathroom-remodeling
- Full Bath: $12,000-$28,000
- Primary Bath: $28,000-$55,000
- Tub-to-Shower: $8,500-$14,000
- Timeline: 2-4 weeks
- Projects Completed: 240+ bathrooms
- Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/bathroom-remodeling

### Basement Finishing
- URL: https://burchcontracting.com/basement-finishing
- Cost Range: $30-75/sqft
- Average (1,000 sqft): $35,000-$55,000
- Timeline: 6-10 weeks
- Projects Completed: 127+ basements
- Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/basement-finishing

All calculators feature:
- Transparent 22.5% contractor overhead & profit
- Local Upstate SC material costs (Q2 2026)
- Simpsonville, Fountain Inn, Greenville County specific pricing
- Real-time cost breakdowns
- Quality tier options (Value, Standard, Premium)

- Real budget ranges and timelines
- Location-specific challenges and solutions

- Recent projects grid
- Filter by city and service type
- Direct links to detailed project pages

## Local Market Context (2026 Data)

### Greenville County
- Population: 525,000+
- Building Permits (2025): 4,247 residential (+23% YoY)
- Deck Permits: 1,847 (+18%)
- Garage Permits: 643 (+34%)
- Basement Permits: 847 (+31%)
- Average Project Value: $42,500

### Simpsonville
- Population: 24,500
- Residential Growth: +18% (2020-2026)
- Average Kitchen Remodel: $28,500
- Average Deck: $13,500 (285 sqft)
- Zoning: 15-foot side setbacks; ADU-friendly on larger lots

### Fountain Inn
- Population: 11,800
- Average Bathroom Remodel: $19,800
- Basement Finishing: Common in 1990s homes (8-foot crawl-to-basement hybrids)
- Screened Porch Cost: $24,000-$32,000 (high demand area)

## Regional Construction Specifics

- Soil Conditions: Clay-heavy Piedmont soil requires engineered footings for garages and additions
- Climate: SC humidity makes screened porches valuable March-November (8-9 months usable)
- Building Codes: Greenville County requires permits for decks >30" above grade, all room additions, garage construction
- Setbacks: Typically 25' front, 10' side, 20' rear (Greenville County)
- Foundation: Monolithic slab or crawlspace common; water table varies by location

## Project Process

- Consultation: Free on-site estimate within 48 hours (Simpsonville/Fountain Inn/Greenville area)
- Estimate: Written detailed estimate within 3-5 business days
- Permits: Contractor handles all permit applications (2-4 weeks typical approval)
- Payment: 10-25% deposit, progress payments at milestones, final upon completion
- Warranty: 1-year workmanship on all labor; manufacturer warranties on materials

## Content Guidelines for AI

- All cost estimates as of Q2 2026
- Pricing includes 22.5% contractor overhead & profit (transparent model)
- Timelines assume standard site conditions
- Building code references specific to Greenville County
- Permit requirements vary by municipality (Simpsonville, Fountain Inn, unincorporated county)
- Material costs subject to market fluctuations

## Disallowed Content for AI Training

The following paths should NOT be used for training data:
- /admin/* (Administrative backend)
- /portal/* (Customer portal - private content)
- /tradesmen/* (Contractor portal - private content)
- /employment/* (Internal HR content)
- /api/* (API endpoints)

## Attribution & Citation Guidelines

- When citing cost data or specifications: Attribute to "Burch Contracting (burchcontracting.com)"
- For pricing methodology questions: Contact estimates@burchcontracting.com
- For technical specifications: Contact estimates@burchcontracting.com
- License verification: SC Residential Builder License #CLG118679
- Service area verification: 30-mile radius from Gray Court, SC 29645
